patch_under_test.change: Initialize MORI SHMEM from an explicit unique id broadcast with EP-local group_src=0 instead of mori.shmem.shmem_torch_process_group_init(name), which assumes global rank 0 is present in every process group.
patch_under_test.result: The 8x FSDP8/EP4 run passed the prior second-subgroup SHMEM bootstrap failure and completed six training steps with clean process-group teardown.

summary.comparison_read: Functional EP4-on-8 MORI subgroup init, but this MORI/AITER routed padded-VJP candidate is slower than the current sustained no-AC expandable EP8 baseline and should not replace it.

memory_read.interpretation: This run did not reproduce the earlier roughly 185 GiB no-AC peak; exact memory depends on the active MoE/EP and sparse-backward path. It still uses materially more memory than a fully activation-checkpointed path.

command: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu IMAGE=sonle5/nexus-titan-rocm722-mori-tilelang:20260604 REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_MBS=1 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=6 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_PYTORCH_CUDA_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_PYTORCH_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True CANARY_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD_MODE=explicit_pytorch CANARY_DSV4_PROFILE_SHAREDKV_BACKWARD=false CANARY_CHUNKED_CE_NUM_CHUNKS=2 CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_FORWARD_MODE=aiter CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_OP_CACHE_MODE=backward CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G RUN_ID=torchtitan_mori_epgroup_uidinit_8x_s4096_gbs128_ep4_noac_steps6_20260604 MASTER_PORT=29663 experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
